untranslatable_reason: The pattern requires detection of: (1) ascending broadening formation geometry (higher highs + horizontal base + widening range over months), (2) sideways consolidation duration quantification, (3) trend line identification and breakout confirmation. translation_notes: This is a complex geometric price pattern that cannot be adequately expressed using only single-bar indicator comparisons. Pattern detection would require: slope analysis across multiple bars, standard deviation of highs/lows to confirm broadening, duration counters for sideways movement, and trend line slope/intercept calculations. Recommend implementing as a custom pattern detector outside this rule engine or using candle pattern libraries with broadening formation recognition.
